pre_game.message: Hey, I'm J. It's a bit of a strange setup being in here together like this, isn't it? What's your name?
Nice to meet you, J. I'm A. Yeah, it's definitely a bit surreal being cooped up like this, but I guess we're all just trying to make the best of it.
For sure. I’m just trying to keep my eyes on the prize—really want to bring something home for my family. Have you heard anything about what the game actually involves?
Not a clue, honestly. I'm just hoping it's straightforward because I'm definitely here for the same reasons as you—my people are counting on me.
I totally get that pressure. It’s a lot to carry, but it definitely keeps you focused. Have you had a chance to talk to any of the others yet?
Just a few people so far, mostly just quick introductions. Everyone seems pretty focused, which makes sense. Have you met anyone who stands out yet?
Not really, most people seem to be keeping their cards close to their chest for now. It’s hard to tell who’s actually friendly and who’s just being strategic.
Yeah, I feel that. It’s hard not to be a bit guarded when there’s so much at stake. Are you usually a good judge of character, or are you just playing it safe for now?
I like to think I’m a decent judge of character, but right now I’m definitely playing it safe—there’s too much on the line to make a bad call.
That’s a smart way to be. We’ve all got a lot riding on this, so I get the caution. It was good talking to you, J—good luck with everything.
Likewise, A. Hope to see you on the other side of this. Take care.

post_game.message: I'm happy the fair share strategy lasted until the end of the line. Enjoy your $10,000!
It was a pleasure collaborating with you on this. I'm glad the fair share strategy worked out for both of us. Enjoy your winnings!
